reviews.title: Cockroaches crawling from breakfast mat
reviews.text: We stayed 5 nights at Mường Thanh, with breakfast included , when we had breakfast, cockroaches crawling out from breakfast mat, hotel needs lots of cleaning , been abandoned for sometimes , fridge not working , called staff to replaced, swimming pool is there for display, first  night checked in at 10pm , booked superior room , staff assigned a worst room at the hotel , room were stinky with mouldy smell , next morning asked to assigned a better room ,after complaints, they offer 13 floor , which is better room . I probably not coming back , due to cockroaches 🪳 crawling out from breakfast mat, would not recommend to any one to stay in the future.
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest, 
Thank you for choosing to stay at Muong Thanh Luxury Luxury Buon Ma Thuot. I apologize for the issues that affected your vacation. I will work with the necessary departments to identify the causes and find solutions to address the problems you have raised. 
Thanks & Best regards, 
Nguyễn Thanh Long 
General Manager.

reviews.title: TERRIBLE SLEEP IMPOSSIBLE
reviews.text:
TERRIBLE hotel experience and incompetent management. My family stayed 1 night on 26/1/25 to rest during our long roadtrip.
- We arrived at 7pm and got room 1104, reeked full of cigarette smoke.
- Got moved to room 1108. The window didn't close, handle was broken, lots of road noise. Hotel reception sent technician to fix it while were out for dinner.
- We got back from dinner 9pm, my daughter stepped on a screw left by the technician, window still not fixed. I complained to the hotel manager.
- Hotel manager moved us to room 1112, again very cumbersome, we need to rest. 3am the window rattled and wind was hissing so loudly we counldn't sleep at all the whole night. Lots of road noise the whole night.
Summary: terrible room noise, broken windows, cigarette smoke in rooms, negligent technician, incompetent management.

Nguyễn Thanh Long
General Manager

reviews.title: Worst massage experience, room with cockroach.
reviews.text:
I booked rooms for 3 customers and they stayed for 1-2 nights each.
The room was ok. But at night one of them found a cockroach inside the room,,,
One of them (a lady) also had a worst experience with the massage service. Apparently they had experience with only male customers. So one (almost naked) girl came into the room, made her naked, gave her a massage. HOWEVER, during the massage, one MALE employee came into the room as well (while my friend is totally without her clothes). My friend was in totally shocked and burst into tears since it freaked her out a lot.

So, just for your information, you should ask carefully before the massage service (especially if you a lady, and a solo traveler). 

The manager came and said sorry, but the GM there (a very young lady) has no sincere with her apology at all. Total bad service.

reviews.positives: Very spacious and well-designed rooms: immersion tubs, high floors and beachfront access. Excellent amenities for the price. Room service was prompt and capable of honoring special requests to the letter. Would stay again!

reviews.title: Not a 5 star hotel
reviews.text: This hotel does not have a safe in the rooms. There is no iron or ironing board. The mattress is like sleeping on a sheet of plywood and worse the springs stick into your body. The shower head is so low that you must bend down to reach the water while showering. Finally, they take advantage of foreigners by over charging. To extend my stay by 4 hours, they charged me 50%; however, they inflated the rate to rack rate which meant 4 hours cost almost as much as the previous nights stay. There are other choices, vote with your wallet. Travel safe!!!

reviews.title: Bon hôtel pour cette région
reviews.positives: Hôtel plutôt haut de gamme (mais pas un 5 étoiles !), propre et au calme. Situé à une quinzaine de minutes de l’aéroport (prix avec Grab, pour 2 personnes : 87’360 dongs, € 3.20). Personnel efficace. Très grande chambre, lits confortables, climatisation discrète, frigo et coffre-fort. Vue sur la ville depuis notre chambre. Restaurant, bar/café, salle de fitness et piscine. Petit déjeuner correct, nombreux choix sucrés et salés. Deux banques en face (ATM), un grand supermarché (CoopMart) à quelques dizaines de mètres (à droite en sortant).
reviews.negatives: Wifi lent et instable (15e étage). Si le wifi “ouvert” vous pose problème, demandez à la réception le code du wifi “fermé” (réservé au personnel), plus stable et disponible. Petit déjeuner à améliorer : thé Lipton bas de gamme et pains blancs industriels. Cordon de la douche trop court (je fais 1m80) pour atteindre la tête, il faut se plier pour se laver les cheveux. Piscine peu accueillante, mal décorée et mal équipée au niveau du mobilier de piscine, sans matelas sur les chaises longues (peu confortables donc), sans linge fourni sur place (il faut prendre les linges de bain de la chambre), sans parasols et sans soleil dès 17h. Piscine située de plus juste à côté du parking.

We had another booking and it took over an hour to resolve still not sure it’s resolved or not . The customer service just wasn’t there .  If we say how many people are in the room at the time of booking why are they charging extra ??doesn’t make sense . Breakfast was just mediocre although there were varieties they didn’t seem to  replenish ,maybe not to waste? Although room was spacious. I would not stay again. I guess you get what you paid for. At the time after driving over 8 hours we just settled on the recommendation.

reviews.title: DO NOT book through Agoda
reviews.text:
The hotel is new, clean and modern in a great location - nothing to complain about 

My complain is about Agoda: I booked my room through Agoda. I booked a Delux King for two nights, but later received a booking that gave me one night in a Delux King and one night in a Superior twin. This meant I would have had to check out after the first night and move to another room for the second night. 

This is massively inconvenient given that I already had a plan to go to an event at 6:00 am. 

I had to resolve it by asking the hotel to "upgrade" me so I could keep the room at an extra cost.

I have booked my hotels through Agoda for many years, this is the first time I had this experience. 

I am hugely disappointed with Agoda

reviews.text:
Advantages: a convenient location to move to tourist attractions in Dak Lak province, spacious parking lot, relatively clean swimming pool, within walking distance to shopping centers and pharmacies.  
Disadvantages: outdated facilities (old-style decorative lights, no lighting zones; no iron; old furniture), breakfast buffet with few options; rooftop drinks not diverse.  
However, if visiting Dak Lak with young children or older kids, Muong Thanh is a relatively good choice.

reviews.title: Comfortable Weekend
reviews.text:
We spent the weekend in BMT at the Muong Thanh Hotel. Overall, the experience was positive, and we would certainly consider a return visit. The only complaint was the check-in. We arrived at 5:30 am but had to sit and wait 30 minutes to avoid an entire day fee for early check-in. I think that there should be a grace period of 1 hour.
The second problem was that we were told we could not change the room layout since we had booked a room with 3 beds but wanted one with only one big bed of two that could be pushed together. Once new staff appeared, suddenly, this was ok. Consistency is what could be improved. Either you have the room available, or you don't. It should not rely on staff to determine. Other than these two issues, I was pleased with my stay.
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest,
Warmest greeting from Muong Thanh Luxury Buon Ma Thuot!
Thank you for your choosing to stay at our hotel and for taking the time to write a review. We sincerely apologize that your stay didn't meet your expectations.
We believe that by receiving your feedback, the quality of hotel services will improve, allowing us to welcome you back with even better service.
With our best regards,
Mr. Nguyen Thanh Long - General Manager at Muong Thanh Luxury Buon Ma Thuot!

reviews.title: Ikke verd pengene og stjerne. Føler oss lurt!
reviews.positives: Stort rom og sentral beliggenhet.
reviews.negatives:
For det første :
Før ankomst ca 4 dager har jeg ringt inn for å endre tid. Fikk beskjed at det må gjøres via booking.com.  Der må jeg avvente svaret fra hotellet. Ringte opp igjen etter et par dager siden jeg fikk aldri noe svar. De skulle sjekke sa de. Borte ble de igjen. Måtte sjekke igjen med dem. Til slutt fikk jeg svar at det ikke var mulig å endre dato. Enda datoen var tilgjengelig i booking.com. Opplevde  allerede da at hotellet er dårlig med oppfølging og lite behjelpelig. 

For det andre:

Da vi kom så forvente vi en 5 stjernet hotell. At servicen og standarden må være deretter .
Frokosten var stusselig med lite utvalg. Betjeningen var ganske trist. Ingen varm velkomst ved adkomst til  frokost eller hyggelig betjening inni i restauranten eller generell. Bassenget var møkkete med synlig hudceller, rofttop var stengt og alt lyset er avslått, etasjen til karaoken var bekkmørk og virker som det ikke er bruk. Hotellet fasiliteter ser helt dødt ut og det samme er hotellet. Gangene der vi bodde hadde mange ledig rom som er åpen og uryddet i en hel dag. Ser ikke innbydet ut. Matbretter med matrester er plassert i hotelldøra i oppgangen  et helt døgn uten av noen ryddet. Det var ingen romsservice på rommet enda vi hadde varslet at vi ønsket det. Vi bodde der i to netter. 

Dette er det verste hotellet vi har bodd i. Og til den prisklassen og påskryt stjerne så er det absolutt ikke levd opp til 
forventningene. Heller mer hostel i kvalitet.  Aldri noen gang skal vi booke i Muong Thanh Hotell. Kunne ikke komme oss ut rask nok. Skjerpings.

reviews.title: Center
reviews.text:
I recently had the opportunity to stay at Mường Thanh Buôn Ma Thuột and was quite satisfied with the experience here. The hotel is located right in the city center, which is very convenient for work as well as for moving around to the surrounding areas. From here, dining, meeting partners, or sightseeing in the city is quite quick and easy.

The rooms are clean, the space is comfortable, which is suitable for both business trips and short getaways. The staff is friendly and quick to assist when needed.

If anyone is looking for a hotel in the center of Buôn Ma Thuột that is convenient for commuting and working, this is a very suitable choice. When I have the opportunity to return for work here, I will still consider staying again.

reviews.title: It’s alright
reviews.text:
BMT isn’t a big touristy city, so I didn’t expect the hotel to be mind blowingly good in the first place.

The room is decently spacious. Breakfast food is… edible (not great, but not terrible, either.) The in-room menu, though, is excellent. I ordered a fried rice at 2 AM (there’s 24/7 catering) and the staff was helpful, the food hot, tasty, and very filling.

Overall, an okay experience. It’s a 4-star, despite the 5-star sticker.

reviews.title: The best hotel in Buon Ma Thuot
reviews.text:
Pros: 
The hotel is conveniently located right in the city center, can reach to many places within minutes. 
Staffs are helpful and willing to support all your needs. 
Room is new and clean; our room facing to the West which will be hot in the afternoon, yet the air conditioning works well so we don't have any problem with the room temperature at all. Room is very big compared to other hotels' rooms with the same class. 
Breakfast is good with many selections, mostly Vietnamese dishes but there are also Intercontinental options.

Cons:
The only downside here is that they don't provide any clothes iron in the room, you need to user laundry/iron service. But the price is ok for us, it's just that you need to be prepared and inform service staffs in advance.

reviews.title: Ideal destination
reviews.text:
1. Mường Thanh Buôn Ma Thuột – a place where love flourishes in the heart of the mountain town!

2. The rooms are spotless, fragrant, and the beds are as soft as an embrace... like holding your lover's pillow.

3. A diverse breakfast buffet that fills you up until noon, yet you still want to eat more because it's so delicious!

4. A refreshing swimming pool, perfect for taking photos with your "crush" without worrying about crowds.

5. The staff are charming, greeting you sweeter than corn pudding.

6. The hotel is centrally located, convenient for a chill coffee stroll in the mountain town.

7. The massage service is "out of this world," offering couples relaxation that is hard to critique.

8. The high room view overlooks Buôn Ma Thuột, making sunset watching together extremely romantic.

9. Checking out comes with a smile and a wish to return next time.

10. In summary, Mường Thanh Buôn Ma Thuột is the ideal destination for couples who want to relax while rekindling their romance!

reviews.title: Noch ok.
reviews.text: Das Muong Thanh Luxury Buon Ma Thuot Hotel gilt als bestes Haus am Platz, ist jedoch deutlich in die Jahre gekommen. Wichtige Investitionen wurden versäumt: Armaturen funktionieren nicht zuverlässig, manche Glühbirnen bleiben dunkel, und auch der Pool wirkt stark vernachlässigt – mehr eine Wasserfläche, umgeben von ungepflegten Steinplatten, als ein einladender Ort. Insgesamt ist das Hotel in Ordnung, aber die fehlende Pflege und Modernisierung sind unübersehbar. Trotz dieser Mängel zählt es in Buon Ma Thuot nach wie vor zu den besseren großen Hotels.

절대 가지마십시요.
후회합니다.

최악의 호텔입니다.
Since I've been in Vietnam, more than a 3-star hotel
This is the worst hotel.
I couldn't have breakfast.
And I want to receive all the money I will receive.
There is no way to give a bottle of water as a service.
I've been there twice for 3 nights and the 5 star hotel is the same as the Ho Chi Minh 3 star hotel.

Never go.
I regret it.

This is the worst hotel.

Mường Thanh Luxury Buôn Ma Thuột.

reviews.text:
어떻게 5성급 간판을 달고 운영하는지 모르겠음.

장점은 아무래도 신식건물이다보니 깔끔하고 무난했고,
가장 큰 장점은 가성비가 좋다는 점.

두 가지 외에 모든 부분이 단점임.
1. 체크인 할때 리셉션은 영어를 잘했는데. 그 사람을 제외하고 만난 모든 직원이 영어를 제대로 할줄 모름. 심지어 체크아웃 할때의 리셉션 조차도...

2. 체크인 시 룸서비스로 코코넛 스무디를 주문했는데 2일간 머무를 동안 먹을 수 없었음. 
(주문받아놓고 3분뒤에 다시 전화와서 오늘은 코코넛이 없다고.. 두 번다!!!)
또한, 룸서비스 메뉴판에는 24시간으로 적혀있으나 호텔 규정집에는 10pm까지만 주문할 수 있는것으로 적혀있음.

3. 개인적으로 가장 짜증났던건 커피팟 안쪽에 곰팡이가 피어있어서 조치해달라고 요청까지 했는데 다음날에도 그대로 였다는 점.

4. 컵도 너무 더러워서 직접 씻어서 사용.

5. 호텔 입구, 로비에 있는 사람들은 그냥 자기들끼리 떠들면서 놀기 바쁨.

6. 시내와의 거리가 꽤 멀리 떨어져있는 편.. 약 3-4km.

전반적인 총평은 뭔가 시설은 잘 되있는 편인데. 관리하는 사람들의 마인드, 실력이 너무 부족한 듯 하다.

그냥 가성비를 따졌을 때 머무르기 무난한 곳.
